title: ci_tooling_20260518: Add fmt, lint, test tasks and GitHub Actions CI
description: Add fmt (format all files), lint (check formatting), and test (luacheck + nvim --headless load check) tasks to the Taskfile. Wire them into a GitHub Actions workflow using DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action that runs lint and test jobs in parallel on every push.
design: Three Taskfile tasks: fmt (stylua + nix fmt), lint (stylua --check + nix fmt --check), test (luacheck lua/ + nvim --headless). devShell in flake.nix provides luacheck and neovim for CI. GitHub Actions uses DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action and nix develop.
acceptance_criteria: task fmt formats all Lua and Nix files; task lint exits non-zero when file not formatted; task test exits non-zero on load error or luacheck failure; CI runs on every push and passes on clean checkout
